title: DumbCrafting
description: Adds stupid ways for crafting and additionally gives new crafts that never existed in the vanilla game!
body:
Dumb Crafting (v1.2) – Smarter Crafting, Dumber Logic!
 

Dumb Crafting is a Minecraft mod that introduces fun and unconventional crafting recipes, giving players new ways to obtain various items. Some previously uncraftable items can now be crafted with unique and sometimes ridiculous recipes, making survival and progression more interesting.

This mod is designed to keep things simple, dumb, and useful! Whether you're looking for an easier way to gather rare materials or just want a fresh take on crafting mechanics, Dumb Crafting adds a creative twist to your gameplay. No more struggling to find certain items—just craft them instead!

Perfect for casual playthroughs or modded adventures, Dumb Crafting is all about having fun with Minecraft’s crafting system in a way that makes sense... or maybe not.
